## Summary


## Verification

- [ ] Native build/tests run.
- [ ] OpenSSL build/tests run, or not affected.

## Security checklist

- [ ] I added or updated positive tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated negative tests for malformed input or misuse.
- [ ] I updated docs and tests for any supported algorithm, parameter, or format change.
- [ ] I checked nonce, IV, salt, RNG, key material, and logging/error exposure.
- [ ] I checked whether release notes or release evidence need updates.
